name: Chocolate Covered Cherries
recipeInstructions:
1. It is easier to handle the cherries if they are frozen first, but not necessary.
2. Beat the egg white until fluffy.
3. Add vanilla, salt, and enough powdered sugar to make a stiff dough.
4. Beat with mixer until very stiff.
5. Knead like bread dough.
6. Wrap the cherries in the sugar mixture and place on buttered wax paper over a cookie sheet.
7. Chill or, better yet, put in the freezer.
8. Melt bitter chocolate and chocolate chips over hot water in a double boiler.
9. Add paraffin to the melted chocolate.
10. Keep the dip warm by placing it over hot water while dipping.
11. Dip cherries; the stems can be left on for handles or use toothpicks.
12. Allow them to drain before eating.
